overviewEn: The Department of Communications Design, Shih Chien University (SCCD) is committed to ensuring that this website is accessible to the widest possible audience, regardless of ability or technology. This website has been designed and developed in accordance with web accessibility design principles, so that visitors using assistive technologies, keyboard-only navigation, or alternative input devices may browse its content with ease.
overviewZh: 實踐大學媒體傳達設計學系（SCCD）致力於確保本網站之內容可為最廣泛之使用者所近用，不因其能力或所使用之科技而有所差異。本網站依循無障礙網頁設計原則進行規劃與建置，使使用輔助科技、僅以鍵盤操作或其他替代輸入裝置之訪客，亦能順利瀏覽網站內容。

points.desEn:
In designing this website, we have implemented the following four key accessibility principles:

  • Keyboard navigation: Every page on this website can be operated using the keyboard alone, without reliance on a pointing device such as a mouse.
  • Access keys: The website provides standard access keys (also represented in Taiwan as ":::") that allow visitors to jump quickly to the main areas of each page.
  • Image alternatives: Meaningful images on the website are accompanied by appropriate alternative text descriptions, so that the information they convey is available to users of screen readers.
  • Link previews: Links that change the interface, navigate to a different address, or open in a new window are accompanied by descriptive text indicating their behavior, so that users know what to expect before activating them.
points.desZh:
本網站於設計時導入下列四項無障礙原則：

  • 鍵盤操作支援：本網站所有頁面均可僅以鍵盤操作，不限於使用滑鼠等指向裝置。
  • 導盲快速鍵：本網站提供標準快速鍵（於台灣亦以「:::」表示），供使用者快速跳至各主要區塊。
  • 圖片替代文字：本網站之有意義圖片均提供適當之替代文字說明，俾使螢幕閱讀器使用者可獲取同等資訊。
  • 連結提示：凡介面變更、網址變更或於新視窗開啟之連結，均附加提示文字，使使用者於點擊前即可了解其行為。

points.desEn: This website aims to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA, and is aligned with the Web Accessibility Guidelines issued by Taiwan's National Communications Commission (NCC). These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities and more usable for all visitors.
points.desZh: 本網站致力於符合 WCAG 2.1 AA 級之網頁內容無障礙指引，並對齊台灣國家通訊傳播委員會（NCC）所訂之無障礙網頁規範。該等指引說明如何使網頁內容對身心障礙者更易於近用，並使整體使用者體驗更為友善。

points.desEn:
For clarity and ease of navigation, each page on this website is organized into three main blocks:

  • Top block: Site header and main navigation menu.
  • Main content block: The primary content of each individual page.
  • Bottom block: Site footer, related links, and contact information.
points.desZh:
為便於瀏覽與導覽，本網站每一頁面均區分為三大區塊：

  • 上方區塊：網站頁首與主要導覽選單。
  • 主要內容區塊：各頁面之主要內容。
  • 下方區塊：網站頁尾、相關連結與聯絡資訊。

points.desEn:
In accordance with Taiwan's accessibility conventions, this website supports the following standard access keys:

  • Alt + U: Jump to the top block (main navigation).
  • Alt + C: Jump to the main content block.
  • Alt + Z: Jump to the bottom block (footer).
  • Tab: Move forward through interactive elements.
  • Shift + Tab: Move backward through interactive elements.
  • Enter / Space: Activate the focused link or button.
points.desZh:
本網站依台灣無障礙慣例，提供下列標準快速鍵：

  • Alt + U：跳至上方區塊（主導覽選單）。
  • Alt + C：跳至主要內容區塊。
  • Alt + Z：跳至下方區塊（頁尾）。
  • Tab：向後移動至下一個互動元件。
  • Shift + Tab：向前移動至上一個互動元件。
  • Enter / Space：啟動目前所聚焦之連結或按鈕。

points.desEn:
In addition to the principles above, this website incorporates the following features:

  • Semantic HTML structure for compatibility with screen readers.
  • Sufficient color contrast between text and background.
  • Resizable text without loss of content or functionality.
  • Visible focus indicators on all interactive elements.
  • Bilingual content presented in both English and Traditional Chinese.
  • Multiple display modes (standard, inverse, and color themes) so that visitors may select the appearance most comfortable to them.
points.desZh:
除前述原則外，本網站另提供下列無障礙功能：

  • 採用語意化 HTML 結構，以相容於螢幕閱讀器。
  • 文字與背景具備充足之色彩對比。
  • 文字可縮放且不影響內容與功能。
  • 所有互動元件均具備可見之焦點指示。
  • 內容以英文與繁體中文雙語呈現。
  • 提供多種顯示模式（標準、反相與色彩主題），俾使用者依個人偏好選擇最為舒適之呈現方式。

points.desEn:
Despite our best efforts, certain content may have known accessibility limitations:

  • Decorative animations and randomized layouts (such as the footer scatter or generative artworks) may not be fully navigable by assistive technologies; equivalent text-based content is provided where reasonably possible.
  • Embedded third-party content (such as YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook) is subject to the accessibility provisions of those external platforms.
  • Generated artworks on the Create page rely on an HTML canvas element; the underlying mode and color choices remain operable via keyboard.
points.desZh:
儘管我們已盡力提升無障礙性，部分內容仍存在以下已知限制：

  • 裝飾性動畫與隨機版面（如頁尾散佈元件、生成藝術作品）可能無法完全透過輔助科技瀏覽；於可行範圍內，我們已提供等效之文字內容。
  • 嵌入之第三方內容（如 YouTube、Instagram、Facebook）之無障礙性，受該等外部平台之相關規範影響。
  • Create 頁面之生成藝術依賴 HTML canvas 元素；其底層之模式與色彩選擇仍可透過鍵盤操作。

points.desEn: This website is reviewed periodically by the department in line with Taiwan's web accessibility standards. We continually monitor and improve the website's accessibility, and welcome reports of any verified accessibility issues so that they can be addressed.
points.desZh: 本網站依台灣無障礙網頁規範定期由本系進行檢視，並持續監控與改善網站之無障礙性。對於使用過程中所遇之無障礙問題，亦歡迎您向我們反映，俾利我們進行改善。

points.desEn:
We welcome your feedback regarding the accessibility of this website. If you encounter any accessibility barriers, or if you have suggestions for improvement, please contact us using the information below.

Department of Communications Design, Shih Chien University

We aim to respond to accessibility feedback within five working days, and will work to address verified issues in a timely manner.
points.desZh:
歡迎您針對本網站之無障礙性提供意見回饋。若您於使用過程中遇有任何無障礙障礙或有改善建議，請以下列方式與我們聯繫：

實踐大學媒體傳達設計學系

Email / 電子郵件: sccd@g2.usc.edu.tw

Tel / 電話: +886 2 2538 1111 #7211

Address / 地址: 5F, Building A, No.70, Dazhi Street, Zhongshan District, Taipei City 104336, Taiwan

地址：104336 台灣台北市中山區大直街 70 號 A 棟 5 樓

我們將盡力於 5 個工作天內回應您所提供之無障礙意見，並儘速處理已確認之問題。

points.desEn: This Accessibility Statement is reviewed periodically and updated as the website evolves. The date shown at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.
points.desZh: 本無障礙聲明將定期檢視，並隨網站之演進進行更新。本頁頂端所示日期，即為本聲明最近一次修訂之日期。

lastUpdatedZh: 最後更新日期：2026 年 5 月
